published_title: A New Approach to Estimating Equilibrium Models for Metropolitan Housing Markets
authors: Dennis Epple; Luis Quintero; Holger Sieg
note: JPE 128(3): 948-983. Conference title was provisional; project circulated in 2013 as GSIA WP 2013-E26 ('Estimating Hedonic Functions for Rents and Values in the Presence of Unobserved Heterogeneity in the Quality for Housing'); paper keywords include nonlinear pricing of quality-differentiated durable housing.

Sole-authored. Circulated as LSE working paper (2014) and CEPR DP 10662 (2015); still listed as a working paper on Alonso's LSE profile. Related later WP 'Recruiting and Selecting for Fit' (SSRN 2018) also appears unpublished.

published_title: Health Care Exceptionalism? Performance and Allocation in the US Health Care Sector
authors: Amitabh Chandra; Amy Finkelstein; Adam Sacarny; Chad Syverson
note: AER 106(8): 2110-2144. Title changed from 'Productivity, Competition and Resource Allocation' working-paper version (NBER w19200).

JPE 127(6): 3018-3069 (December 2019). The 2013 IDEI WP 801 / TSE WP 13-439 'Cooperation vs. Collusion: How Essentiality Shapes Co-opetition' was retitled; TSE's publication database records the working paper as replaced by the JPE article.
